narrative:
Williamsburg Township C (precinct in Clermont County) has 581 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
